category_sources: source_facts.description describes nyx as a command-line monitor for Tor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nyx; official homepage title and copy use Nyx.
docs_sources: Official Nyx homepage contains getting started, usage, configuration, FAQ, and development documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Nyx homepage documents the source repository clone URL as git.torproject.org/nyx.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says command-line monitor for Tor; official homepage describes real-time Tor status, bandwidth, logs, connections, and configuration.
